overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a Divination classroom from a video game, featuring students seated around tables with crystal balls in a Gothic stone tower room with purple drapery and large arched windows. The camera remains fixed as NPCs occasionally walk through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: Divination classroom with crystal ball tables and floor cushions

agents.ego_description: static camera fixed in position observing the classroom interior

notable_agents.action: student in yellow robes with turban walks from left to right across the foreground between 12-16 seconds

entered.detail: Grey stone block walls with Gothic architectural details forming the room perimeter
Heavy purple fabric curtains hanging from ceiling around the room perimeter
Tall Gothic arched windows with diamond-patterned glass letting in daylight
Large wall tapestry depicting a robed wizard with an astrolabe against a starry background
Glowing crystal balls on stands atop the wooden tables
Low circular wooden tables arranged throughout the room
Round upholstered cushions and ottomans for seating around the tables
Polished wooden floor partially covered by circular rugs

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a static view of a Divination classroom with Gothic stone architecture and purple drapery. Students sit on cushions around low tables with glowing crystal balls. Natural light filters through tall arched windows. A student in yellow robes walks across the foreground from left to right.

scene_state.functional_zone: Divination classroom with crystal ball tables and floor cushions

agents.ego_description: static camera fixed in position observing the classroom interior

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walks from right to left behind the seated students between 20-24 seconds
student in yellow robes with turban walks from left to right across the foreground again between 55-60 seconds

segments.scene_description: The scene continues with the static camera view of the Divination classroom. The seated students remain in place with their crystal balls. A student in dark robes crosses from right to left in the background, followed later by another crossing of the student in yellow robes in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a Gothic Divination classroom where the atmosphere is defined by the steady movement of students through a mystical environment. It begins with a view of the stone tower room, where natural light filters through tall arched windows and illuminates students seated on cushions around glowing crystal balls. As the scene unfolds, a student in yellow robes walks across the foreground from left to right, momentarily breaking the stillness of the purple drapery and stone architecture. The camera remains fixed as the activity shifts, with a student in dark robes crossing the background from right to left before the student in yellow robes passes through the foreground once more.
